mapper.select: WITH grouped_data AS ( SELECT LEFT(thid.inout_dt, 6) AS year_month, COUNT(CASE WHEN thid.in_qty IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS total_in_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN thid.out_qty IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS total_out_count FROM esg.tb_hazmat_inout_detail thid WHERE thid.write_year = #{writeYear} AND thid.doc_no = #{docNo} AND thid.doc_type = #{docType} GROUP BY LEFT(thid.inout_dt, 6) ) SELECT thid.*, g.year_month, g.total_in_count + g.total_out_count AS total_qty FROM esg.tb_hazmat_inout_detail thid LEFT JOIN grouped_data g ON LEFT(thid.inout_dt, 6) = g.year_month WHERE thid.write_year = #{writeYear} AND thid.doc_no = #{docNo} AND thid.doc_type = #{docType};

WITH RECURSIVE all_dates AS ( SELECT CONCAT(#{searchCd}, LPAD(n::TEXT, 2, '0')) AS inout_dt FROM generate_series(1, 31) n WHERE to_date(CONCAT(#{searchCd}, '01'), 'YYYYMMDD') + (n - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day' < to_date(CONCAT(#{searchCd}, '01'), 'YYYYMMDD') + INTERVAL '1 month' ) SELECT d.inout_dt, thid.in_qty, thid.out_qty, thid.store_qty, thid.remark, thid.doc_seq FROM all_dates d LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hazmat_inout_detail thid ON d.inout_dt = thid.inout_dt AND thid.write_year = #{writeYear} AND thid.doc_no = #{docNo} AND thid.doc_type = #{docType} WHERE d.inout_dt LIKE #{searchCd} || '%' ORDER BY d.inout_dt;
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_hazmat_inout WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hazmat_inout ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, workplace_id, hazmat_id, msds_synonym, cas_no, daily_volume, daily_time, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{workplaceId}, #{hazmatId}, #{msdsSynonym}, #{casNo}, #{dailyVolume}, #{dailyTime}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_hazmat_inout_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hazmat_inout_detail ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, inout_dt, in_qty, out_qty, store_qty, remark, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{inoutDt}, #{inQty}, #{outQty}, #{storeQty}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
